fields.title: Inception
fields.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology.

fields.title: Interstellar
fields.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

fields.title: The Matrix
fields.description: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality.

fields.title: Gladiator
fields.description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

fields.title: The Dark Knight
fields.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham.

fields.title: Pulp Fiction
fields.description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine.

fields.title: Avatar
fields.description: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders.

fields.title: The Prestige
fields.description: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion.

fields.title: Memento
fields.description: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

fields.title: Se7en
fields.description: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motifs.

fields.title: Dune
fields.description: Feature adaptation of Frank Herbert's science fiction novel, about the son of a noble family entrusted with the protection.

fields.title: Parasite
fields.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

fields.title: The Batman
fields.description: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate.

fields.title: Whiplash
fields.description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored.

fields.title: Oppenheimer
fields.description: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
